name: Construct Mapping review for Ssr Assessment Stakes Boundaries Consequential Update bundle
summary: Accepted. The staged records keep real, synthetic, hybrid, and mismatched-response origins distinct; they separate score labels from response origin; and they preserve label-source boundaries for human-scored operational responses, approved synthetic responses, induced off-topic labels, and target-category generated classroom responses.

findings.claim_or_issue: Wang et al. use mismatched real operational responses as synthetic off-topic cases, not LLM-generated student responses.
findings.why_it_matters: Treating these as ordinary LLM-generated synthetic responses would blur response origin and overstate relevance to synthetic scoring validation.
findings.recommended_action: Keep Wang et al. categorized as adjacent high-stakes detection/stress-test evidence, as staged.
